definitions.text: To resolve (a contest, problem, dispute, etc.); to choose, determine, or settle.
examples: The election will be decided on foreign policies.
It was decided to meet here at midnight.

definitions.text: To make a judgment, especially after deliberation.
examples: You must decide between good and evil.
I have decided that it is healthier to walk to work.

definitions.text: To cause someone to come to a decision.
examples: Your admonition decided me against my intended course of action.
